text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on board helping keep our community safe and welcoming.
Hi @guide_sam! Your application for event helper has been approved. We can't wait to see the awesome events you help organize for the community!
Welcome @newbie_kim! You've been approved as a community member. Head over to #intro to introduce yourself and get started!
Hi @mentor_lina! Your application to be a community mentor has been approved. We're so grateful for your willingness to help new members learn and grow!
